summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitAI with updated Gemini/Nano Banana integration. All backend APIs working perfectly including new generate-outfits and generate-outfit-image endpoints. Frontend functionality verified with minor navigation note.

design_issues.issue: Step circles (2, 3) appear to be visual indicators rather than clickable navigation - users should use Next/Back buttons

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns correct FitAI message
Backend API /api/generate-outfits accepts multipart form data and returns outfit suggestions
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image works with Nano Banana for AI image generation
Backend API /api/saved-looks GET returns array correctly
Backend API /api/saved-looks POST creates new saved look successfully
Backend API /api/saved-looks DELETE removes saved look successfully
Landing page loads with correct FitAI title and Try it now button
Navigation from landing page to onboarding works correctly
Onboarding step 1 self photo upload area works with proper data-testid
Next button properly disabled until photo uploaded
Back navigation from onboarding to landing page works
Saved looks page loads with correct empty state message
SwipePage correctly redirects to onboarding when no data available
Image compression utility properly imported and used in OnboardingPage
Generate AI Image button implemented with data-testid='generate-image-btn'
API keys (GEMINI_API_KEY and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) configured correctly
Error handling works correctly across all endpoints
